name: What's the step-by-step process after my lawyer gets hit with AI fake case sanctions?
description: Pay fine, notify judges, self-report to bar, update AI protocols.[1]

mainEntity.name: What's the step-by-step process after my lawyer gets hit with AI fake case sanctions?

acceptedAnswer.text: Pay fine, notify judges, self-report to bar, update AI protocols.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: First, pay fines and comply with court orders like notifying judges, then self-report to state bar. In Levidow, sanctions included $5K fine and letters to six judges.[1] Key factors: internal review, client notifications, AI policy updates. Document compliance, seek bar counsel advice, monitor for client lawsuits. Full transparency prevents escalation.
